query: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.ageGroup, s.`order`, COUNT(q.id) as questionCount FROM stages s LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.stageId = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.ageGroup, s.`order` ORDER BY s.ageGroup, s.`order`;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3GB82FZGmc2ADuw.a7b90b108d57 --database jiPvNqaHRUg9H2uZgXUx3J --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, s.ageGroup, s.`order`, COUNT(q.id) as questionCount FROM stages s LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.stageId = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.ageGroup, s.`order` ORDER BY s.ageGroup, s.`order`;
